_meta.description: Authentic published impact-function presets the Vulnerability studio applies with one click. TC presets set tc_v_half (Emanuel form, v_thresh=25.7 m/s); flood presets set flood_mdr at the standard depth breakpoints.
_meta.generator: scripts/build_impf_presets.py (run in the CLIMADA worker env)
